# Blazium (game engine)

> Blazium is a free, open-source, community-driven game engine based on Godot 4.4.1, designed for developing 2D and 3D games, cross-platform projects, and XR experiences. It offers power, flexibility, and compatibility with Godot assets while removing compatibility-breaking features.

Important notes:
- Blazium is fully compatible with Godot 4.X projects and assets.
- It provides additional tools, templates, and services to enhance game development.
- Contributions are welcome through bug reports, code submissions, or documentation improvements, often leveraging Godot's contribution guidelines.

## Documentation
- [What is Blazium?](https://blazium.app/what-is-blazium): Overview of the engine's features and purpose.
- [Developer Tools](https://blazium.app/dev-tools): Information on tools, templates, and services available for developers.
- [Engine Documentation](https://docs.godotengine.org/en/4.4): Comprehensive documentation, as Blazium is built on Godot.
- [Engine Repository](https://github.com/blazium-games/blazium): Blazium (game engine) GitHub Repository.

## Downloads
- [Get Blazium](https://blazium.app/download): Download links for the latest version of the engine.
- [Latest Release: 0.5.68](https://www.indiedb.com/engines/blazium-engine/news/blazium-release-0568): Article detailing the features of the latest Blazium release.

## Examples
- [Games made with Blazium](https://blazium.app/games): List of games developed using the Blazium engine.

## Contacts
- [GitHub Org](https://github.com/blazium-games): Blazium Games GitHub Organization.
- [X/Twitter Profile](https://x.com/BlaziumGames): Blazium Games X/Twitter Profile.
- [YouTube Channel](https://youtube.com/@blazium): Blazium Games YouTube Channel.
- [Blazium Games Team](https://blazium.app/meet-the-team): Blazium Games team.
- [Discord Server](https://blazium.app/chat): Blazium Games Discord server.

## More by Blazium
- [Blazium (game engine)](https://blazium.app): Blazium game engine is a free, open-source, community-driven game engine based on Godot 4.4.1, designed for developing 2D and 3D games, cross-platform projects, and XR experiences. It offers power, flexibility, and compatibility with Godot assets while removing compatibility-breaking features.
- [Blazium Games](https://blazium.games): Blazium Games provides a platform for developers to share and discover gaming-related assets.
- [DDDBrowser](https://dddbrowser.online): DDDBrowser is a 3D scene browser that allows you to explore and interact with virtual worlds loaded from web URLs. It supports rich 3D scenes with models, lighting, audio, scripting, and portals that connect different scenes together.
- [RUNE Interface](https://rune.shoyo.work): RUNE Interface is an automation tool with a visual editor, AI integration, and desktop-native performance.
- [SHOYO.WORK](https://shoyo.work): SHOYO.WORK helps developers, freelancers & teams build professional portfolios to showcase projects with advanced analytics, customizable sections, and secure content. Supports individual & enterprise needs.
